title: Noor Hears Animal Sounds
synopsis: Baby Noor discovers different animal sounds in her neighborhood, from meowing cats to chirping birds. Each page introduces a new animal sound with repetitive, soothing language that helps babies learn to predict and participate in the story.

pages.text: Noor hears sounds. What does Noor hear?

illustration.description: Baby Noor with warm brown skin and dark curly hair sits on a soft pink blanket in a sunny garden. She has large, bright eyes and wears a yellow dress with tiny flower patterns. Her expression shows wonder and curiosity as she tilts her head to listen. Pastel flowers and green grass create a gentle background.
illustration.alt: Baby Noor sitting in a garden, listening attentively

pages.text: Meow, meow! A cat says meow.

illustration.description: A fluffy orange tabby cat sits near Noor, mouth open mid-meow. The cat has friendly green eyes and a pink nose. Noor points excitedly at the cat with a big smile. Soft purple and lavender flowers frame the scene with dappled sunlight creating warm shadows.
illustration.alt: Orange cat meowing while Noor points and smiles

pages.text: Woof, woof! A dog says woof.

illustration.description: A small golden retriever puppy with a wagging tail stands beside Noor, barking happily. Noor claps her hands with delight, her eyes sparkling. The background shows a white picket fence and soft blue sky with puffy white clouds in watercolor style.
illustration.alt: Golden puppy barking while Noor claps her hands

pages.text: Tweet, tweet! A bird says tweet.

illustration.description: A bright red cardinal perches on a low branch above Noor, singing with its beak open. Noor reaches up toward the bird with both arms raised, giggling. Soft green leaves and tiny white blossoms create a gentle canopy overhead with warm morning light filtering through.
illustration.alt: Red bird singing in tree while Noor reaches up happily

pages.text: Moo, moo! A cow says moo.

illustration.description: A gentle black and white spotted cow peers over a wooden fence at Noor. The cow has kind brown eyes and pink udders. Noor stands holding the fence rail, looking up in amazement. Rolling green hills and a red barn create a peaceful farm backdrop in soft pastels.
illustration.alt: Friendly cow looking over fence at amazed Noor

pages.text: Quack, quack! A duck says quack.

illustration.description: A yellow duckling waddles near a small blue pond while Noor sits cross-legged nearby, watching intently. The duck has an orange beak and webbed feet. Water ripples reflect the soft sky, and cattails grow around the pond's edge in muted greens and browns.
illustration.alt: Yellow duckling by pond while Noor sits watching

pages.text: Baa, baa! A sheep says baa.

illustration.description: A fluffy white sheep with a pink nose stands in a meadow of soft grass. Noor sits nearby, patting the sheep's woolly side gently. Tiny wildflowers dot the green field, and distant rolling hills fade into a pale lavender sky with wispy clouds.
illustration.alt: White sheep being petted by Noor in flower meadow

pages.text: Neigh, neigh! A horse says neigh.

illustration.description: A brown pony with a flowing black mane stands near Noor, who reaches up to touch its soft nose. The horse's eyes are gentle and dark. A wooden stable with red doors sits in the background under a golden sunset sky painted in warm watercolor washes.
illustration.alt: Brown pony with Noor reaching up to touch its nose

pages.text: So many sounds! Noor loves animal sounds.

illustration.description: Noor sits in the center surrounded by all the animals from the story - the cat, dog, bird, cow, duck, sheep, and horse arranged in a gentle circle around her. Everyone looks happy and peaceful. Soft rainbow colors arc overhead in the sky, creating a magical, harmonious scene.
illustration.alt: Noor surrounded by all the animals in a peaceful circle

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What sound does the cat make?
questions.explanation: Cats say 'meow'! The orange cat in the story says meow, meow.

questions.question: Which animal says 'moo'?
questions.explanation: Cows say 'moo'! The black and white cow says moo, moo.

questions.question: What does Noor love?
questions.explanation: Noor loves animal sounds! She enjoys listening to all the different animals.
